extension.summary: Protector de pantalla Apple TV para Kodi
extension.description: This screensaver addon provides Apple TV aerial screensavers in Kodi
Este complemento habilita el protector de pantalla Aerial de Apple TV para Kodi
extension.news:
v15.3.0.3 (2026-07-18) - Remove legacy loading screen assets and fallback Python logic to prevent crashes with custom skin layouts - Finalize layout integration for Arctic Fuse 3 override compatibility
v14.3.0.3 (2026-07-18) - Complete visual overhaul of XML layouts to natively support Kodi's default Estuary skin
v13.3.0.3 (2026-07-18) - Implement location string localization via Apple's TVIdleScreenStrings bundle - Add support for dynamically updating Point of Interest (POI) waypoints during video playback - Implement smart line-wrapping logic to automatically break extremely long location strings across two lines - Rearrange OSD text layout and drop the date field for a cleaner visual aesthetic - Update payload URL
